CustomField.description: The identifier, name, or path of the item to evaluate. The required format depends on the 'Type' field. For Custom Permission type: unprefixed names check local/subscriber permissions, 'core.' prefix checks package permissions, and 'namespace__' syntax checks fully-qualified namespaced permissions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Format depends on Type. Profile: profile name. Permission Set Group: API name. Custom Permission: API name (use core.Name for package permissions). Public Group: DeveloperName. Hierarchical CS: Object.Field. List CS: Object.Name.Field. Custom Metadata: Object.DevName.Field.
CustomField.label: Target
